architecture.summary: BlockID.au — Startup Navigation System (SCN: Validation → Position → Value → Direction → Capital). Next.js standalone + Supabase, zero-downtime deploys (immutable releases + port swap). C-Level AI agents (cto/cfo/cpo/cmo/cro/clo/chro/ciso/cdo/coo/rnd) self-research and self-upgrade domain modules under src/lib/agents/. Self-upgrade runs as a CEO implementing-plan loop; deploy-causing stages are gated to off-peak (AEST 22:00-06:00) for 24/7 availability. CFO owns VC-grade valuation (cfo-valuation.ts).
notes: v0.2.0 — CEO implementing-plan loop (research → CEO plan → code → version/milestone/architecture), off-peak deploy gating, cloud-routine silent-death guard, RnD added as daily-research agent.

v0.3.0 — CFO VC-grade valuation engine (src/lib/agents/cfo-valuation.ts): market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM), 4 valuation methods, projections, unit economics, break-even, payback, financial injection. CFO registered in the self-upgrade loop and set to daily research. See .claude/goals/cfo-vc-valuation.md.

tasks.title: Mandatory daily C-Level reporting template + EOD enforcement
tasks.rationale: Standardise every C-Level status update (content/reports/_daily-report-template.md). EOD enforcement provided by the cron-health silent-death guard which flags any agent that did not report. KPI: 100% of C-Level agents report each cycle.

tasks.title: Off-peak daily auto-upgrade CI/CD pipeline (first deploy < 48h)
tasks.rationale: Minimal viable CI/CD already live: agent-deploy (tsc→lint→build→smoke→deploy-live zero-downtime) + orchestrator CEO loop scheduled 12/14/16/18 UTC off-peak; cloud CEO routine ships code at 19:00 UTC. First auto-upgrade deploy runs tonight (well within 48h). KPI: ≥1 successful auto-deploy/day, 0 peak-hour restarts.

tasks.title: Daily QA health-check — automated test suite in the QA dashboard
tasks.rationale: vitest suite (80 tests) wired into agent-healthcheck Code Quality category → appears in the daily qa-daily report. First health-check: 80/80 passing. KPI: 100% test pass on the daily QA dashboard; alert on any regression.

tasks.title: Pilot a new valuation-model feature (allocate ≥10% AI budget)
tasks.rationale: Use ≥10% of the monthly AI budget (~$10 of $100; only $0.18 spent MTD so headroom is ample) to prototype an improved valuation model in src/lib/valuation.ts. KPI: +5% analysis speed (lower analyse duration_ms) with no accuracy regression on the vitest suite. RnD owns the experiment; ship via the CEO loop.

tasks.title: Power-user survey + interview program (self-healing feedback + upsell)
tasks.rationale: Feedback capture API (/api/feedback → user_feedback) already exists; add proactive outreach: a short in-app survey on the self-healing feature and a power-user interview invite for the most active accounts. KPI: ≥20 survey responses + ≥5 interviews in 2 weeks; ≥1 validated upsell signal. CRO owns; ship via the CEO loop.

tasks.title: Valuation dashboard UI with submenus (Summary/Market/Methods/Projections/Unit Economics/Break-even/Injection/Scenarios)
tasks.rationale: Surface buildVcValuationReport() in the logged-in workspace as an interactive Valuation section: tabs/cards per component, live sliders (growth/churn/margin) that re-run the engine. See .claude/goals/cfo-vc-valuation.md. KPI: founder can explore scenarios live.

tasks.title: Excel download/upload of the valuation model (exceljs)
tasks.rationale: Download a formatted multi-sheet workbook (Assumptions, Projections, Methods, Use-of-Funds, Sources) from the engine; upload actuals/assumptions to override inputs and re-value. KPI: ≥1 downloadable model per valuation.

tasks.title: /api/valuation/vc + wire valuation section into the report pipeline (PDF/DOCX)
tasks.rationale: Expose VcValuationReport via API and include the full VC analysis in paid PDF/DOCX reports; persist per-startup so valuations track over time.

tasks.title: SCN context detection — auto-detect startup phase from input (idea/URL/GitHub/revenue) and drive valuation + report
tasks.rationale: On input, classify stage per the SCN model: free-text idea/biz desc → Idea/Validation; website URL → fetch + analyse content/features → lift above Idea; GitHub repo → analyse source → Product/MVP signal; revenue (or follow-up questions) → Growth. Detected context feeds cfo-valuation inputs (stage/sector/mrr) and the SCN report so phase, valuation and next-best-action match the evidence. KPI: correct phase on ≥80% of inputs; every input type produces a contextual valuation + report.

milestones.title: CEO implementing-plan loop activated + board directives Q seeded; reporting template, off-peak CI/CD, and QA test integration shipped
CFO VC-grade valuation engine shipped (market sizing, 4 methods, projections, unit economics, break-even, payback, financial injection) + CFO registered in loop + daily research + /goal

history.note: CEO implementing-plan loop initialised — research → CEO decision → code → version/milestone/architecture.

Board directives recorded as CEO plan. Shipped: reporting template (T0001), off-peak CI/CD schedule (T0002), QA test suite in daily dashboard (T0005). Pending pilots: valuation model (T0003), survey/interview program (T0004).

CFO prioritised: VC-grade valuation engine (cfo-valuation.ts, 7/7 tests) + registered in self-upgrade loop + daily research + /goal cfo-vc-valuation.md. Queued: valuation dashboard UI (T0006), Excel I/O (T0007), API/report wiring (T0008), SCN context detection (T0009).
